changelog.title: Confidence-scaled sizing, Gold fix & UI polish
changes: New: Dynamic position sizing — size scales with ML confidence (0.25× at 80% → 1.0× at 95%+)
New: HEALTHY points state doubles all position sizes via ladder
Fixed: Gold in-flight ghost order permanently resolved — rate-cap errors no longer block markets
Fixed: Stale pending orders auto-expire after 300s; startup wipes crossed-session ghosts
New: POST /api/clear_inflight/{epic} for live manual recovery without restart
Fixed: System tab uptime, position sync & OHLC cache no longer flicker
New: Test/dry-run trade toggle on Trades tab — real P&L stats unaffected by test trades
Fixed: Per-market Active Trades now visible on individual market tabs
Fixed: flatten/all confirmed not causing trading pause
New: __pycache__ cleared on every launch — stale bytecode can never block new code
New: Startup smoke test checks for stale pending orders and auto-unpauses if needed

changelog.title: Correct IG point values & trailing stop tuning
changes: Fixed: ig_point_value_gbp corrected for all instruments (Nasdaq £14.94, Wall St £7.87, Gold £0.79, Nikkei £5.13)
Changed: Position sizes recalibrated for £10k account (~£50–375 risk/trade)
New: ATR-scaled trailing stop triggers — trail at 0.75× ATR, breakeven at 0.4× ATR
New: Limit extension enabled — take-profit extends up to 3× on trending moves
Changed: CAUTION size multiplier lifted to 0.5× flat for all confidence ≥ 80%

changelog.title: Cold start, blended confidence & startup cleanup
changes: Changed: COLD_START_BARS reduced from 6 to 2 — markets ready in ~10 min
New: Dashboard market boxes show ML-blended confidence
Fixed: Startup kills stale processes and removes lock file automatically
New: Startup self-test suite runs on every launch
Fixed: Active trades now visible on market tabs and Trades tab
